settings.text: Workflow Wire - Our Daily AI Newsletter specifically for Aussie Small Businesses

settings.story_headline: Federal automation grants unlock new copilots for services firms
settings.story_summary: Canberra is accelerating support for small firms adopting automation, with co-funded help aimed at reducing admin-heavy work across compliance, invoicing and operations.
settings.story_takeaway: If your business still handles repetitive admin manually, this kind of funding could lower the cost of getting started.

settings.story_headline: Brisbane Chamber pilots AI concierge for café timetables
settings.story_summary: The Brisbane Chamber is funding a four-week pilot of a GPT scheduling concierge that responds to walk-ins, books catering, and updates shift rosters, saving participating cafés an average of 90 minutes a day on texts and calls.
settings.story_takeaway: Test the concierge on a single venue and scale it across your cafés or salons to free human time for hospitality rather than replies.

settings.story_headline: OpenAI ships GPT Agents for boutique ops teams
settings.story_summary: OpenAI released GPT Agents tailored for boutique operations, letting founders record a workflow and have the Agent coordinate inventory checks, reorder prompts, and appointment bookings without code.
settings.story_takeaway: Capture your most repetitive customer exchange, turn it into an Agent, and let it answer routine queries so your people focus on high-value wins.

settings.heading: Workflow Wire, daily AI news for Australian small business.
settings.subheading:
A short, practical daily read covering the AI and automation updates that actually matter to small business owners in Australia.

No hype. No deep model rabbit holes. Just the stories, shifts and tools worth paying attention to.
settings.benefit_1: A curated daily breakdown of AI and automation news relevant to small business owners.
settings.benefit_2: Plain-English summaries with a clear 'why it matters' angle.
settings.benefit_3: A practical next step you can actually take in your business today.
settings.benefit_4: A smarter way to stay ahead without doomscrolling LinkedIn, X or tech blogs.
settings.supporting_text: Drop your Shopify email signup section directly above or below this block to turn Instagram traffic into subscribers.
settings.preview_summary: AI-powered workflows are quietly being stitched into everyday small-business operations across Australia, and the winners will be the owners who start small and move early.
settings.practical_move_text: Pick one repetitive admin task in your business and map how an AI assistant or automation could save 30 minutes a day.
